case_title: KING GARY VS OBRIEN KIERNAN INV CO CARE OF MR KIERNAN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OBRIEN KIERNAN INV CO CARE OF MR KIERNAN
POS FILED ON SUBPOENA FOR FRAN MCGOWAN.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,079.50 FILED BY KING GARY AS TO DEFENDANT OBRIEN KIERNAN INV CO CARE OF MR KIERNAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
